title: SuggestionInline
description: Abstract base type for nodes that indicate a suggested change to inline content.
$comment:
This is an abstract base type used in Stencila Schema for suggestions that operate on
inline content.

It extends [`Suggestion`](./suggestion.md) so fine-grained proposed edits
within prose can be represented separately from block-level changes while
reusing the common suggestion model.

Key properties are primarily inherited from [`Suggestion`](./suggestion.md),
with semantics centered on inline-content replacements and originals.

analogues.name: inline tracked change
analogues.notes: Approximate analogue for suggested insertions, deletions, and replacements within prose spans.

type.$comment: This is a special property analogous to JSON-LD's `@type` keyword.

id.$comment: This is a special property analogous to JSON-LD's `@id` keyword.

suggestionType.description: The type of suggestion including whether it is an insertion or a deletion.

suggestionStatus.description: The status of the suggestion including whether it is the original, or is accepted, or rejected.

provenance.description: A summary of the provenance of the content within the suggestion.

executionDuration.description: Time taken to generate the suggestion.

executionEnded.description: The timestamp when the generation ended.

content.description: The suggested content. For insertions and replacements, this is the new content; for deletions, this is the content being deleted.

min.description: Generate a single fixed text value.

low.description: Generate a single arbitrary, non-recursive, inline node

high.description: Generate up to two arbitrary, non-recursive, inline nodes

max.description: Generate up to four arbitrary, non-recursive, inline nodes

original.description: The original content. For replacements, this is the content being replaced; for deletions, this should be absent.
